oe.t: abbr. （常印在账单上）遗漏不在此限（omissions excepted）；古英语（Old English）
oe.d:
a diphthong, employed in the Latin language, and thence in the
   English language, as the representative of the Greek diphthong oi. In
   many words in common use, e alone stands instead of /. Classicists
   prefer to write the diphthong oe separate in Latin words.

oea.t: [计]= Operator Error Analysis,操作员错误分析

oeb.t: abbr. Oregon Educational Broadcasting 俄勒冈州教育广播; organic electrolyte battery 有机电解质蓄电池

oec.t: abbr. organizational entity code 组织实体代码

oecist.t: n. (尤指古希腊的)殖民地开拓者

oecology.t: n. 生态学, 社会生态学
oecology.d:
n. The various relations of animals and plants to one
   another and to the outer world.

oecs.t: (oec 的复数) abbr. organizational entity code 组织实体代码

oecumenical.t: a. 经济的, 节俭的
oecumenical.d:
s concerned with promoting unity among churches or religions
s of worldwide scope or applicability

oecumenicity.t: n. [宗](尤指在普世教会运动推动下的)普世基督教大联合(状态)

oed.d: n an unabridged dictionary constructed on historical principles

oedema.t:
n. 水肿, 浮肿
[医] 水肿
oedema.d: n swelling from excessive accumulation of watery fluid in cells, tissues, or serous cavities

oedematous.d:
a. Pertaining to, or of the nature of, edema; affected
   with edema.

oedipal complex.t: [网络] 恋母情结；俄狄浦斯情结；恋母情结复杂性

oedipus.t: n. 俄狄浦斯(希腊神话人物)
oedipus.d: n. (Greek mythology) a tragic king of Thebes who unknowingly killed his father Laius and married his mother Jocasta; the subject of the drama `Oedipus Rex' by Sophocles

oedipus rex.t: [网络] 伊底帕斯王；俄狄浦斯王；俄狄普斯王

oedogoniales.d: n. simple or branched filamentous freshwater green algae

oedogonium.d: n. type genus of Oedogoniaceae; freshwater green algae having long unbranched filaments; usually free-floating when mature

oee.t: [医][=office of environmental education]环境教育局

oeec.t: abbr. Organization for European Economic Cooperation 欧洲经济合作组织

oefelein's sign.t: [医] 埃费林氏征(溃疡病的背肌反射现象)

oehl's layer.t: [医] 奥耳氏层, 透明层

oehler's symptom.t: [医] 厄勒氏症状(间歇性跛行症的足冷及苍白)

oeillade.d: n. A glance of the eye; an amorous look.

oemed.t: (OEM 的过去分词) [计] 原始设备制造商

oeming.t: (OEM 的现在分词) [计] 原始设备制造商

oems.t: abbr. open enterprise management system 开放式企业管理系统

oen.t: abbr. oenanthic 酒的; oenanthyl 酿酒的; oenological 酿酒学; oenopoetic 酒歌

oenanthic.d:
a. Having, or imparting, the odor characteristic of the
   bouquet of wine; specifically used, formerly, to designate an acid
   whose ethereal salts were supposed to occasion the peculiar bouquet, or
   aroma, of old wine. Cf. Oenanthylic.

oenanthol.d:
n. An oily substance obtained by the distillation of castor
   oil, recognized as the aldehyde of oenanthylic acid, and hence called
   also oenanthaldehyde.

oenanthone.d: n. The ketone of oenanthic acid.

oenanthyl.d:
n. A hydrocarbon radical formerly supposed to exist in
   oenanthic acid, now known to be identical with heptyl.

oenethyl.t: [医] 伊内西耳, 2-甲氨基庚烷

oenethyl hydrochloride.t: [医] 盐酸伊内西耳, 盐酸2-甲氨基庚烷

oenochoe.t: n. (古希腊和古罗马的)陶酒坛(具有弧状把手和圆形或三叶状嘴)

oenologist.d: n. a specialist in wine making

oenology.t: n. 酿酒学, 葡萄酒工艺学
oenology.d: n the art of wine making

oenomania.t: [医] 震颤谵妄, 间发性酒狂

oenometer.t: 葡萄酒酒度计(测定酒度)

oenone.t: n. [希神]俄诺涅(特洛伊王子Paris初娶的山林水泽中女神)

oenophile.t: n. 嗜酒的人,酒的行家,酒品尝家

oenothera biennis.t: [网络] 月见草；月见草油；夜来香

oeo.t: abbr. 经济机会局（Office of Economic Opportunity）

oeq.t: abbr. Office of Environmental Quality <美国>环境质量处

oerbiss.t: [医] 匐行疹, 幼虫移行病(指非洲若干地区的)

oerlikons.t: (Oerlikon 的复数) n. 厄利康高射炮

oersted.t:
n. 奥(斯特)(磁场强度单位)
[医] 奥斯特(磁场强度单位)
oersted.d:
n. the magnetic field strength 1 cm from a unit magnetic pole
n. Danish physicist (1777-1851)

oertel's treatment.t: [医] 厄尔特耳氏疗法(运动节食疗法)

oes.t: abbr. Order of the Eastern Star （天主教）东星会

oesophageal.t:
a. 食道
[医] 食管的
oesophageal.d: a. Same as Esophagus, Esophageal, etc.

oesophagitis.d: n inflammation of the esophagus; often caused by gastroesophageal reflux

oesophagoscope.d: n an optical instrument for examining the inside of the esophagus

oesophagoscopy.t: [医] 食管镜检查, 食管内窥检查

oesophagus.d: n the passage between the pharynx and the stomach

oesophaguses.t: n. 食管, 食道( oesophagus的复数形式 )
oesophaguses.d: n. the passage between the pharynx and the stomach

oestradiol.d: n the most powerful female hormone that occurs naturally; synthesized and used to treat estrogen deficiency and breast cancer

oestrane.t:
[化] 雌烷; 雌甾烷
[医] 雌烷

oestreicher's reaction.t: [医] 伊斯特赖歇尔氏反应, 黄嘌呤醇反应(见于尿毒症组织)

oestrin treatment.t: [医] 厄尔特耳氏疗法(运动节食疗法)

oestriol.d: n a naturally occurring estrogenic hormone; a synthetic form is used to treat estrogen deficiency

oestrogen.t:
n. 雌激素
[化] 雌激素; 雌甾激素
oestrogen.d: n a general term for female steroid sex hormones that are secreted by the ovary and responsible for typical female sexual characteristics

oestrogenic.t: [医] 动情的, 雌激素的

oestrogens.t:
(oestrogen 的复数) n. 雌激素
[化] 雌激素; 雌甾激素
oestrogens.d:
plural of oestrogen
n a general term for female steroid sex hormones that are secreted by the ovary and responsible for typical female sexual characteristics

oestrone.d: n a naturally occurring weak estrogenic hormone secreted by the mammalian ovary; synthesized (trade name Estronol) and used to treat estrogen deficiency

oestrous.t: a. (雌性动物)发情的,诱发发情的

oestrual.d:
a. Of or pertaining to sexual desire; -- mostly applied to
   brute animals; as, the oestrual period; oestrual influence.

oestrum.t:
n. 牛虻, 强烈的欲望, 狂热, 机能亢进, (动物的)动情, 动情期
[医] 动情期

oestrus.t:
n. 发情, 发情周期
[医] 狂蝇属
oestrus.d: n. type genus of the Oestridae: sheep botflies

oeuvre.d: n. the total output of a writer or artist (or a substantial part of it)

oeuvres.d:
plural of oeuvre
n. the total output of a writer or artist (or a substantial part of it)

oew.t: abbr. Office of Economic Warfare 经济战办公室; Oki Electric Works <日本>冲绳电气工业股份公司; ordinary electromagnetic wave 寻常电磁波
